name: super-build-kit
description: LLM-agnostic APIVR and Elite Build Goals operating system for audited software work.

interface.shortDescription: APIVR and Elite Build Goals guardrails for agentic software work.
interface.longDescription: A portable LLM-agnostic operating system for planning, auditing, implementing, verifying, and releasing software with evidence-backed APIVR phases, Elite Build Goals, zero-placeholder plans, test-first implementation, subagent review gates, repeatable agent loops, long-horizon run control, setup safety, MCP/tool governance, run tracing, native-first worktrees, UI/UX design quality, anti-AI writing quality, deployment, automation, reporting, integration, and media routing.
defaultPrompt: Run an APIVR audit on this repo.
Plan this feature with Elite Build Goals.
Review this UI and copy for APIVR quality.
Design a bounded repeatable agent loop.
Create a long-horizon run control plan.
Route hosting, jobs, APIs, assets, and subagents.
